# idcloudhost_loadbalancer (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `billing_account_id` (Number)
- `display_name` (String)
- `network_uuid` (String)

### Optional

- `forwarding_rules` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--forwarding_rules))
- `reserve_public_ip` (Boolean)
- `targets` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--targets))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `private_address` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `user_id` (Number)
- `uuid` (String)
